description: Fun, style and utility are the highlights of this black gym bag from fastrack. The ideal companion for your workouts, this bag comes with loads of compartments and pockets to hold everything from your soiled clothes to a fresh towel. Just stuff it with all your essentials and get going.Made of nylon for enhanced durabilityA small pouch on the top with a drawstring to hold small articlesA roomy main compartment that can be accessed by a zipper on the top or frontMedium sized zippered compartments on the front and side to hold gym essentialsButtoned flap covering the side compartmentDetachable single shoulder strap tht can be attached to plastic loops on the frontVertical loops on the front with a drawstring to transform the gym bag into a duffel bagSmall zippered pocket on the side with brand name and logo printed on itPadded, adjustable and detachable shoulder straps that distribute weight evenly and protect the shoulders and back from injuriesLong, roomy compartment at the backBranded zippers and sliders for easy use Nylon bonded thread for long lifeBrand name printed and embroidered at the backCareDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
